tasks.label: Backend: Uvicorn
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $venvPath=''; if (Test-Path "$env:WORKSPACE\backend\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1") { $venvPath="$env:WORKSPACE\backend\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:WORKSPACE\backend\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1") { $venvPath="$env:WORKSPACE\backend\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:WORKSPACE\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1") { $venvPath="$env:WORKSPACE\.venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1" } elseif (Test-Path "$env:WORKSPACE\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1") { $venvPath="$env:WORKSPACE\venv\Scripts\Activate.ps1" }; if ($venvPath -ne '') { . $venvPath } else { Write-Host 'No venv found. Using system Python.' }; cd "$env:WORKSPACE\backend"; uvicorn app.main:app --reload
